version_compatibility_test_matrix.description: Expected behavior for ESM format version compatibility testing

0.2.0_to_0.3.0.summary: Closed function registry — removes the open-set extension points (`call` op + `registered_functions` block) and the runtime-registered `operators` block; adds a top-level `enums` block and the `fn` / `enum` AST ops. See docs/rfcs/closed-function-registry.md.
breaking_changes: Top-level `registered_functions` block removed; files declaring it are rejected by the v0.3.0 schema.
Top-level `operators` block removed; files declaring it are rejected by the v0.3.0 schema.
AST op `call` (with `handler_id`) removed; replaced by `fn` (with `name`) drawing from the closed registry in esm-spec.md §9.2.
Coupling type `operator_apply` removed (it referenced the removed `operators` block); grid-level loss processes migrate to discretization schemes per docs/rfcs/discretization.md §7.
added: AST op `fn` — invokes a spec-defined closed function from §9.2 by dotted name.
AST op `enum` — resolves a file-local symbol to its declared integer at load time.
migration_path: Math expressible in finite closed form (e.g. `sq(x) = x²`): rewrite as AST (`{op:'^', args:[x,2]}`); delete the corresponding `registered_functions` entry and any `call` node referencing it.

Tabulated lookups: replace `{op:'call', handler_id:'flux_interp_O3', args:[sza]}` with `{op:'index', args:['table', {op:'fn', name:'interp.searchsorted', args:[sza, {op:'const', value:[...]}]}]}` (boundary handling shifts from per-binding handler to the spec-pinned `searchsorted` semantics).

Categorical lookups (Wesely-style land-use × season): declare an `enums` block, replace string keys with `{op:'enum', args:['enum_name', 'symbol']}`, and use the existing `index` op into a `const` table.
State-mutating numerical schemes (advection, diffusion, deposition application): migrate to the `discretizations` block per docs/rfcs/discretization.md §7.

test_cases.description: Exact version match - should load successfully
Same minor version, newer patch - should load
Newer minor version - forward compatible with warning
warnings: File version 0.2.0 is newer than library version 0.1.0. Unknown fields will be ignored.

test_cases.description: Much newer minor version with unknown fields - should load but warn
warnings: File version 0.3.0 is newer than library version 0.1.0. Unknown fields will be ignored.
Skipping JSON Schema validation due to version mismatch

test_cases.description: Major version 1.x.x - should be rejected by 0.x.x library
test_cases.error: Unsupported major version 1. This library supports major version 0 only.
Unsupported major version 2. This library supports major version 0 only.

test_cases.description: Invalid version string format - should fail schema validation
test_cases.error: Version string 'not.a.version' does not match semver pattern

test_cases.description: Missing required 'esm' field - should fail schema validation
Double-digit minor version - should load with warning
warnings: File version 0.10.0 is newer than library version 0.1.0

test_cases.description: Large patch number - should load successfully
Large major version - should be rejected
test_cases.error: Unsupported major version 12. This library supports major version 0 only.

test_cases.description: Version as number instead of string - should fail validation
Version with prerelease identifier - should fail current schema
test_cases.error: Version string does not match semver pattern (prerelease not supported)

migration_tests.description: Example of migrating from version 0.0.5 to 0.1.0
changes: Converted CH4 units from ppbv to mol/mol

validation_rules.major_version_compatibility: Libraries must reject files with different major versions
validation_rules.minor_version_backward_compatibility: Libraries must accept files with minor version <= their supported minor version
validation_rules.minor_version_forward_compatibility: Libraries should warn but attempt to load files with minor version > their supported minor version
validation_rules.patch_version_compatibility: Patch versions are fully compatible within the same major.minor
validation_rules.schema_validation: Skip JSON Schema validation for forward-compatible files (newer minor versions)
validation_rules.unknown_field_handling: Unknown fields in forward-compatible files should be ignored silently

error_codes.UNSUPPORTED_MAJOR_VERSION: File major version is not supported by this library
error_codes.INVALID_VERSION_FORMAT: Version string does not match semver pattern
error_codes.SCHEMA_VALIDATION_ERROR: File does not conform to JSON Schema
